page_metadata.biotools__summary: DSFworld is a web application for the method Differential Scanning Fluorimetry (DSF) that enables rapid determination of a protein’s apparent melting temperature (Tma).
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: DSFworld is a web application for the method Differential Scanning Fluorimetry (DSF) that enables rapid determination of a protein’s apparent melting temperature (Tma).
